arts.ttl: Ianis Hagi claims Rangers injury torture means he can't be broken as major Gers figure credited for comeback support
arts.sum: Ianis Hagi has claimed that his brutal Rangers spell means that nothing will EVER break him in football - and he's credited Light Blues skipper James Tavernier for helping him through his gauntlet of battles with injury, mental barriers and more. Hagi joined Rangers under Steven Gerrard back in 2018, and enjoyed what remains the best spell of his Ibrox career under the Liverpool legend as the Ibrox side won the Scottish Premiership for the first time in nine years under the Englishman.

arts.ttl: John Souttar to be offered Rangers new deal as Philippe Clement admits 'he's been our best defender'
arts.sum: He's been the key man in the heart of the Ibrox defence and his boss wants him well beyond the 18 months left on his contract

arts.ttl: 6 Rangers presser headlines as Philippe Clement uses Nicolas Kuhn logic to ease fan worries over goalscoring woes
arts.sum: But with questions still looming over their season so far having been sat 11 points behind Celtic in the title race heading into the midweek fixtures, plenty of talk about Rangers ' lack of prolific manner in front of goal was on the agenda - with Kuhn used as an example to issue a sense of patience behind the Light Blues' squad. I don't want to make comparisons too much with other teams, but the better player in the offensive part on the other side of the town was six months ago, or last season, he was not starting there [Nicholas Kuhn].

arts.ttl: Ianis Hagi breaks Rangers bomb squad silence as he admits he’ll 'never forget’ what key Ibrox figure did for him
arts.sum: The Romanian had a rollercoaster summer but is back in the fold under Philippe Clement

arts.ttl: Malcolm Offord WON'T become Rangers chairman as 'talks stall' for vacancy with backup options on agenda
arts.sum: Rangers will have to continue their search for a new chairman, according to reports - with a move for Malcolm Offord breaking down after talks stalled at the start of the week. Get the latest news sent straight to your messages by joining our Rangers WhatsApp community today.

arts.ttl: Is Rangers vs Kilmarnock on TV? Channel, live stream and team news for Premiership match
arts.sum: Join Football Scotland's Rangers WhatsApp community! Otherwise, you will be able to watch the highlights, which will be posted on YouTube via club accounts and Sky Sports Football after the game.

arts.ttl: Malcolm Offord 'out' Rangers running to be new chairman as Ibrox giants suffer huge blow
arts.sum: The Tory donor has been in talks with Rangers to succeed John Bennett but those discussions have now stalled

arts.ttl: Dundee derby & Celtic v Kilmarnock in Scottish Cup
arts.sum: Celtic host Kilmarnock, Rangers meet Fraserburgh and there will be a Dundee derby at Dens Park after the draw for the fourth round of the Scottish Cup.

arts.ttl: Inside Ianis Hagi's Rangers reconciliation as ostracised star lifts lid on club peace talks
arts.sum: The Romanian was frozen out at the start of the season but has come in from the cold

arts.ttl: How Celtic fans can still get their hands on Rangers Premier Sports Cup Final tickets as second chance emerges
arts.sum: Parkhead season ticket holders who were unsuccessful in the first ticket ballot have been offered a glimmer of hope
